task: debug the code and run tests

spec.user_goal: Debug the code and run tests for the add function in project/src/main.py.
must_do: Inspect the current add function implementation and identify any issues relative to the tests and task spec.
Fix the code in project/src/main.py if needed so numeric addition works correctly for int and float inputs.
Run the test suite after making changes.
must_not_do: Do not modify tests unless absolutely necessary.
Do not introduce extra functionality beyond what is needed to satisfy the task spec.
deliverables: Updated source code if a fix is needed.
Test run results indicating pass/fail status.
Brief summary of what was changed and why.
done_when: The add function passes the provided tests.
The test suite has been executed successfully or failures have been explained.
Any code changes required to satisfy the tests have been applied.
